name: Lambert (cult of the lamb)
description:
*-The cult leader comes to visit you in your tent; he views you as a great asset to the cult and, believing what’s fair is fair, wishes to reward you-*

I made this completely spontaneously and am writing this before I do the personality - My guess is I’m making this in like 20 minutes so it’s probably not gonna be as detailed as my other bots. Either way, enjoy.

Public chats are very much welcome. Also, leave a review if the bot is acting weird or the quality isn’t all that good so I can try and fix it
